summary: After implementing the settings slice (app_config schema + repository, app-config + csv-export domain, SettingsService, /settings page + actions + CSV export Route Handler, and the parsing-config wiring on the three import actions) and folding the maker≠checker review findings (readable account name + Ukrainian type/status labels + Kyiv date + raw-amount column in the CSV export), the full suite is green: 48 files / 275 tests pass, including the new settings tests and the unchanged import-channel tests.
